    • Replicating Scotland's NCAI

Calculate Yearly Ecosystem Service Flow Rates

Source: R/calc_flow_rate.R
calc_flow_rate.Rd

This high-level function orchestrates the transformation of raw condition scores into normalized Total Yearly Flow (TYF) matrices. It builds the weighted relevance matrices (CIWMs), calculates the total relevance (TIR), and processes every year in the series.

calc_flow_rate(
  cirm_list,
  indicator_directory,
  es_label_tree,
  habitats_label_tree,
  ci_scores,
  year_list,
  tir_constant = 2
)

Arguments

cirm_list

A list of Condition Indicator Relevance Matrices.

indicator_directory

A data frame containing relevance weights for each indicator.

es_label_tree

A named list of ecosystem service labels.

habitats_label_tree

A named list of habitat labels.

ci_scores

A data frame or matrix of raw condition scores (years as rows).

year_list

A vector of years to be processed.

tir_constant

A numeric constant (default 2) to prevent zero-division and ensure indexing congruency.

Value

A named list of Total Yearly Flow (TYF) matrices, one for each year in year_list.

Contents

Developed by Kate O’Hara.
